ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the enrollment data is recorded */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the students */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_lunch_program" (
  "lunch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the free lunch record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students participating in the free lunch program */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the free lunch data is recorded */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the students participating in the program */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lunch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_lunch_program_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_to_pupil_ratio" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the teacher-to-pupil ratio record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "pupils_per_teacher" REAL /* Number of pupils per teacher */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the ratio data is recorded */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level for which the ratio is recorded */,
  "teacher_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the teachers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_to_pupil_ratio_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_extension" TEXT /* Phone extension of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_contacts_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., textbooks, computers) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, in use) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was acquired */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_resources_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., graduation rate, test scores) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the performance data is recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., standardized test scores, graduation rate, attendance rate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_finance" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure by the school */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the financial data is recorded */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_finance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., academic, sports, cultural) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_events_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the staff member */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years the staff member has served */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the staff member */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., audit, inspection, support) */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the visit report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_visits_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
